backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature report listing implemented UI features, associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-like mapping of frontend file paths to short functional descriptions.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base setup defining OKLCH theme variables and dark mode tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling navigation, cart logic, order creation, and layout structure.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Responsive footer with contact details, social icons, quick links, and a contact form.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky responsive header with logo, nav links, cart icon, and mobile sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Brand: Scrollable brand logo slider wrapped in a section container with styled heading.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Categ: Renders a horizontally scrollable list of category cards with images, descriptions, and a button.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Galle: Displays a product gallery grid inside a styled section with a title and tagline.
frontend/src/components/storefront/HeroS: Creates a full‑screen hero banner with animated vertical lines and bold headline text.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Notif: Shows a modal confirming an order with an icon, message, and close button.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Produ: Displays a product card with image, name, price, and a button to view details.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Quant: Provides plus/minus buttons to adjust quantity, with a compact mode option.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Seaso: Renders a horizontal carousel of bestselling products with images, details, and view buttons.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Secti: A layout wrapper that adds section spacing and container alignment.
frontend/src/components/storefront/WhyCh: Lists key store features with icons and text inside a styled section.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages creation and caching of backend actors based on Internet Identity using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for authentication via Internet Identity, including login and identity loading.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers, CSS variables, base styles, custom scrollbars, gradients, and animations.
frontend/src/lib/data.ts: Defines static product and category lists with details such as price, images, and descriptions.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Declares TypeScript interfaces for products, cart items, orders, categories, and brands.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Implements the shopping cart page with item listing, quantity updates, removal, and checkout handling.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage with hero, product grid, categories, bestsellers, brands, and informational sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays past orders from localStorage or an empty state if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed product info with images, features, quantity selection, and add‑to‑cart action.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, animations, and container settings.
project_state.json: Defines the project's state, including responsive design goals for the NutritionXP site, existing features, and a pending feature request for full responsiveness.
